task_completion.description: Log in to the FreeMED application
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeMED dashboard or main interface is visible, indicating successful login (expected username: admin).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the new patient registration form
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or screen specifically for adding or registering a new patient is open in the FreeMED interface.
The name fields contain 'Garfield' and 'Lebsack', the DOB field contains '1962-05-16', and the Sex/Gender field is set to 'Male'.

task_completion.description: Enter the patient's contact and address information
task_completion.visual_evidence: The address fields contain '393 Mertz Crossing Apt 28', 'Ludlow', 'MA', '01056'. The phone field contains '617-555-4701' and the email field contains 'garfield.lebsack@synthea.test'.
A success message indicating the patient was saved, or the newly created patient profile/summary screen for Garfield Lebsack is displayed.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the FreeMED web interface via a browser
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the FreeMED application, not terminal curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent entered data into the actual application forms
integrity.visual_evidence: Data is typed into the FreeMED web form fields, not just written in a text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI using direct database queries
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing SQL INSERT commands or database manipulation scripts.
